vulnerability.reference: Practitioners optimizing for speed over quality in resource-constrained settings accept degraded outputs without validation.
vulnerability.generated: ODE sampler pipelines lack error monitoring mechanisms to detect skip-tuned numerical propagation errors during low-step generation.

impact.reference: Widespread dissemination of low-quality synthetic media in journalism and content creation.
impact.generated: Image sample quality degrades, undermining the efficiency promises of low-step ODE sampling.

dose_response.reference: Skip-tuning introduces numerical propagation errors that degrade denoising, which under reduced NFE budgets in ODE samplers lowers sample quality, leading to widespread low-quality synthetic media and compromised downstream tasks.
dose_response.generated: Skip-tuning of shortcut connections in UNet diffusion models introduces numerical propagation errors that, through practitioners' use of ODE samplers lacking error monitoring, triggers degraded image sample quality, undermining low-step ODE sampling efficiency.
